steps.title: Match the plural noun
steps.content: The blank modifies the plural noun letters and points back to the eighteen letters just mentioned. The determiner therefore must be plural.

steps.title: Remove singular determiners
steps.content: Choice A is singular and cannot modify letters. Choice B and Choice C are singular demonstratives, so they also fail to agree with the plural noun. The plural demonstrative correctly points back to the letters. The answer is D.
